'''''Star Wars Weekly'' 96''' is the ninety-sixth issue in the ''[[Star Wars Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[December 26]], [[1979]]. It included the original story "[[Switch!]]" by [[Archie Goodwin]].

==Contents==
*"[[Switch!]]"
*"Deathlok the Demolisher Part 8: Five to one, Deathlok... one in five... no one here ges out alive!"
*"Guardians of the galaxy! Part 23: Conclusion!"
*"Tales of the Watcher: I dared explore the unknown emptiness!"
